original_snippet_context: News about a shipment of banknotes.
relevant_quote: com destino a Caixa de Amortisação.
justification: This mention refers to a "Caixa de Amortisação" (Amortization Fund).  While related to monetary policy and possibly functioning alongside a "Caixa de Conversão," this specific text only reports on the arrival of banknotes for the Amortization Fund and doesn't express any opinion on monetary policy.
